description_long: This dirt bike features a compact, rugged frame with a visibly worn and patched-together appearance, suggesting heavy use or a custom, urban-modified style. The body is primarily composed of metal panels in red, yellow, and green hues, with areas of rust and chipped paint adding to its gritty aesthetic. The seat is black and appears well-cushioned, mounted on a prominent red coil spring for shock absorption. The exhaust system is highly distinctive, with four pipes on each side and two large, blue-tipped mufflers extending upward behind the handlebars. The front and rear fenders are asymmetrical, with the rear fender showing a pink accent and the front fender partially missing. The wheels are thick and robust, with a unique, angular spoke pattern, and the handlebars are tall and curved, giving the bike a chopper-like silhouette.
description: A rugged, custom dirt bike with a patchwork of red, yellow, and green metal panels, tall curved handlebars, and a striking multi-pipe exhaust system with blue tips.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red and yellow body, black seat with red coil spring, four exhaust pipes, and blue-tipped mufflers.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the dual blue-tipped mufflers, black seat, and yellow rear panel with an 'X' marking.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same patchwork body, seat, and exhaust pipes, with more visibility of the green engine casing.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the tall, curved handlebars, blue-tipped mufflers, and the front wheel with its angular spoke pattern.
attribute_exhaust_type: dual high-mounted with multiple side pipes
